basics.name: Abrar Zahin Raihan
basics.label: Final-Year CSE Undergraduate at BUET | NLP · Multimodal AI · AI Systems
basics.summary: Final-year Computer Science and Engineering student at Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET). Research at the intersection of NLP, multimodal AI, and AI systems — with a focus on mechanistic interpretability, efficient inference, and principled pipeline design. Author of four workshop papers at ACL, CVPR, and ICML 2026. Two-time national/international hackathon champion.

work.name: SysModeler.ai
work.summary: AI research assistant focused on SysML diagram generation and layout optimization.
highlights: Designed and implemented layout algorithms to generate structured, readable, and visually consistent SysML diagrams
Developed a pipeline to convert images into semantically accurate SysML representations

work.name: Syslabo Corp
work.summary: Built full-stack automation tooling for organizational workflows.
highlights: Built a full-stack MERN application automating organizational hierarchy chart management, replacing a manual Excel-based system
Developed dynamic UI/UX with Japanese localization using MaterialUI and GoJS
Designed scalable database schemas and RESTful APIs for hierarchical data management
Received best architecture design recognition among all interns; received full-time job offer

education.institution: Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET)
highlights: Research interests: NLP, Multimodal AI, AI Systems, Mechanistic Interpretability

awards.title: IEEE VIP Cup 2025 — Champions
awards.summary: 1st place among 40+ international teams in multimodal RGB-IR fusion for real-time drone detection, tracking, and payload classification. Presented at ICIP 2025, Anchorage, AK. Team: NeuronX.

awards.title: Poridhi.io × Brain Station 23 AI Engineering Hackathon — Champions
awards.summary: 1st place among 86 teams (300+ participants). Intent-based multilingual product search with in-memory LLM inference via llama.cpp and 4-bit quantization. Team: BUET XFACTOR.

awards.title: শব্দতরী — Where Dialects Flow into Bangla: 1st Runner-Up
awards.summary: Low-resource ASR transcribing 20 regional Bangladeshi dialects into standard Bangla via transfer learning and dialect-aware embeddings. Team: DejaView.

awards.title: BUET CSE Fest Hackathon 2024 — 2nd Runner-Up
awards.summary: Microservices and DevOps category. Scalable real-time ticketing system on Azure Kubernetes Service with CI/CD, load testing, and monitoring.

awards.title: Therap JavaFest 2024 — Top 10 Finalist
awards.summary: Top 10 among 1300+ participants. CodeSprout: AI-powered gamified coding education platform for children with block-based programming, ML chatbot, and computer vision.

awards.title: Code Samurai Hackathon 2024 — 10th Place
awards.summary: Waste management system for DNCC with algorithmic challenge solutions, a web app, and a React Native mobile app.

publications.name: Causal Localization of the English Pivot in LLaVA: Mechanistic VLM Analysis and Training-Free Multilingual Steering
publications.publisher: 1st Workshop on Multilinguality in the Era of LLMs (MeLLM) @ ACL 2026
publications.summary: Accepted (Archival). Localized English-pivot bottleneck in LLaVA-1.5-7B to layers 5–17 via causal activation patching. Training-free steering vectors improve multilingual VQA by up to +6.5 pp without fine-tuning.

publications.name: Where Do Affordances Crystallize? Video vs. Image Self-Supervised Encoders for Embodied Perception
publications.summary: Accepted (Poster). Video SSL encoders crystallize affordance signal 4 layers earlier than image SSL. Top-3 attention heads retain full signal at 5.3× compute reduction.

publications.name: When Does Visual Context Help? Adaptive Modality Gating for Efficient Multimodal QA
publications.summary: Under Review. AdaGate predicts from text alone whether vision encoder invocation helps. Reduces vision calls by ~53% with near-identical keyword F1.

publications.name: SpatialCoT: Chain-of-Thought Spatial Grounding for Viewpoint-Robust 3D-LLMs
publications.summary: Under Review. Five-step geometry-grounded CoT reduces viewpoint-rotation accuracy degradation from 77% to 41% on Real-3DQA.
